summary: orderservice outbound calls to paymentservice failing above 5% for 3m
detail: Errors are TLS handshake failures on the orderservice -> paymentservice mTLS connection. Sampled handshake error: 'x509: certificate has expired or is not yet valid'. The paymentservice serving leaf certificate (CN=paymentservice.svc, serial 0x4f2a) notAfter is 2026-06-18T15:04:00Z.
